S.FORM: == bungwi, bongwi == ť≥≥ŚįĺŤćČ salaedan :ś§ćÁČ©ÁēĆ Plantae panan :Ťē®ť°ěś§ćÁČ©ťĖÄ Pteridophyta upiz :ÁúüŤē®Á∂Ī Polypodiopsida mata :śįīťĺćť™®Áõģ Polypodiales sapamat :ť≥≥ŚįĺŤē®ÁßĎ Pteridaceae mikitinay :ť≥≥ŚįĺŤē®ŚĪ¨ Pteris hicahicaay :šļēś¨ĄťāäŤćČ P. multifida u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == buŇčwi, boŇčwi == *** sar~…ĺa…ôdan :*** pr~…ĺanta…ô panan :***** pt…ôridopńßjta upiz :*** por~…ĺjpodiopsida mata :**** por~…ĺjpodiar~…ĺ…ôs sapamat :**** pt…ôrida ¶…ôa…ô mikitinaj :**** pt…ôris ńßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj :**** p. mur~…ĺtifida u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
S.FORM: == bungwi, bongwi == ť≥≥ŚįĺŤćČ salaedan :ś§ćÁČ©ÁēĆ Plantae panan :Ťē®ť°ěś§ćÁČ©ťĖÄ Pteridophyta upiz :ÁúüŤē®Á∂Ī Polypodiopsida mata :śįīťĺćť™®Áõģ Polypodiales sapamat :ť≥≥ŚįĺŤē®ÁßĎ Pteridaceae mikitinay :ť≥≥ŚįĺŤē®ŚĪ¨ Pteris hicahicaay :šļēś¨ĄťāäŤćČ P. multifida u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
